title: Edge AI Exploration
tagline: Edge AI and computer vision exploration — privacy-aware local intelligence on embedded hardware
problem: Most computer vision systems depend on cloud processing, creating latency, privacy, and connectivity issues. Exploring what is possible at the edge.
solution: Experimenting with Grove Vision AI V2 for on-device inference — object detection, classification, and visual monitoring without cloud dependency.
impact: Early exploration. Learning about embedded AI, edge deployment, and practical computer vision use cases.
